Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Service provider
Question Description: Please provide the legal name of the provider

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Website

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Service category
Question Description: IMPORTANTChoosing the correct Service Category is critical for accurate risk assessment and ensuring your request is handled correctly. The selected category must accurately reflect the nature of the service being provided by the Third Party.DO Select Based On:WHAT service the third party is providing (e.g. Software Consulting Recruitment).The nature and type of work being performed (e.g. Marketing Software IT Consulting Legal Services).Example 1: PwC = Professional Services & Consulting  > ConsultantExample 2: Slack = Software & Tools > Communication & Collaboration SaaSDO NOT Select Based On:Which Wise department is procuring the service.Who at Wise will ultimately use the service.If you are unsure which category to choose please:Review the Service Categories Wiki page: https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/x/-dcN4QConnect with the Third-Party Management Team on Slack: #thirdpartymanagement

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Service Description
Question Description: Summarise the service you intend to purchase. This will assist us in understanding your requirements efficiently and expediting the review process.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: External Contact information
Question Description: Please provide the Vendor point of contact for this engagement. This external contact will be in charge of completing any necessary vendor questionnaires for the onboarding process.[Please do not input Wise contacts here - these can be added later in the form as followers to the request.]

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Contracting Wise entity
Question Description: Please specify the Wise entity that will be executing the agreement with the third party. This information is crucial to ensure proper legal and financial coherence down the line.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Confirmation of other Wise entities consuming the service
Question Description: Please confirm if the Wise entity signing the contract will be the only entity consuming the services. If the service is not restricted to just one entity or is distributed to other entities select "No" and indicate below which entities further consume that service.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Additional Wise entities that will be using the service
Question Description: Select "Global / Servicing all Wise entities" if the service is not limited to specific entities.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Ownership type of the banking service provider
Question Description: Please indicate the ownership type of the banking service provider

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Contact for Banking Team
Question Description: Please provide the contact details of the person from Wise's banking team.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Nature of the engagement
Question Description: Please select the type of engagement into which we will enter with the provider.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: What is the length of this third party engagement?
Question Description: Please indicate the length of the engagement. If a definitive duration is not specified please provide your preferred ideal length for this engagement.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Renewal clause
Question Description: Does this engagement include an automatic renewal clause? Kindly specify if this engagement contains a clause for automatic renewal in the contract.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Total Contract Value
Question Description: If you currently possess the order form/contract kindly specify the total cost as detailed in the document. If you have only received a quote or an initial indicative cost please provide that information. State the cost excluding any applicable taxes and VAT. If you're opting for a monthly subscription please indicate the estimated cost per annum.Example 1: You are signing a contract with a cost of $10000 per annum for three years with an implementation fee of $5000. The total contract value is therefore $35000.Example 2: You're buying a monthly subscription for $100 per month. Please enter the annual value as the total value; in this case would be $1200.For FREE Trials & POCs please enter "0" as the amount.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please choose the payment method for this arrangement.
Question Description: Wise's standard payment method is via invoice. Please refer to our [Corporate Card Policy](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/FIN/pages/2976858643/Corporate+credit+card+policy) for more information. Direct debits are only to be used with appropriate approval from Accounts Payable.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please select the cost centre that will be incurring this cost.
Question Description: The appropriate Finance business partner managing the cost centre will be notified of the vendor request.If unsure of which cost centre to select please consult with your manager or a member of the Finance team. If the cost is split between multiple cost centres please choose the main one.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Start Date
Question Description: Please indicate the planned or proposed start date for this engagement.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Contract: End date
Question Description: Please enter the contract end date if known. In case of a POC please indicate the tentative end date for the trial and in case of a recurring agreement the next known renewal date.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Commercials
Question Description: Please upload any commercial/pricing documents relating to this engagement such as quotes proposals and draft commercial documents.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please provide the registered address of the third party.
Question Description: If you have this information now please populate - otherwise the supplier will need to populate this.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Do you require login information such as username and password or API keys and tokens to use this service or solution?
Question Description: Any services requiring login information will have to be registered in UT.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Acknowledgement of Contracting Process
Question Description: Per Wise's Third Party Management and Outsourcing Policy we are required to perform Due Diligence and obtain approval before finalizing a contract with a third party. Kindly refrain from executing the contract until the onboarding process for the third party has been satisfactorily completed.PS! If you're sharing Wise data with your counterparty during onboarding you should sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). Learn more about [NDAs here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TPM/pages/3747986721/Third+Party+Contract+Management+Hub+-+DRAFT+not+final#1%EF%B8%8F%E2%83%A3--Non-Disclose-Agreement-(NDA))

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Request for proposal
Question Description: We strongly recommend going through the Request for Proposal (RFP) process to help us choose the best vendor ensuring we find the right fit for our needs and get the best value! [Check out RFP guide here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TPM/pages/3622411165/RFP+Process+A+Step-by-Step+Guide) and feel free to reach out on #thirdpartymanagement for assistance!

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Conflict of Interest
Question Description: Please confirm that you (Relationship Owner) the Cost Centre owner or the signatory of the contract are not aware of and do not have any actual potential or perceived conflicts of interest in relation to the onboarding of this Service Provider. This means that you or to the best of your knowledge any other involved party have no personal interests such as family friendships financial or social factors that could compromise your judgment decisions or actions in relation to this Service Provider.Please ensure to consult our [Global Conflict of Interest Policy](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/CC/pages/2765980971/Global+Conflicts+of+Interest+Policy) for further guidance. In case of a conflict a ticket must be raised through the [Conflicts of Interest Tool](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/1117).

Question Title: Service Description
Question Description: Summarise the service you intend to purchase. This will assist us in understanding your requirements efficiently and expediting the review process.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: External Contact information
Question Description: Please provide the Vendor point of contact for this engagement. This external contact will be in charge of completing any necessary vendor questionnaires for the onboarding process.[Please do not input Wise contacts here - these can be added later in the form as followers to the request.]

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Contracting Wise entity
Question Description: Please specify the Wise entity that will be executing the agreement with the third party. This information is crucial to ensure proper legal and financial coherence down the line.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Confirmation of other Wise entities consuming the service
Question Description: Please confirm if the Wise entity signing the contract will be the only entity consuming the services. If the service is not restricted to just one entity or is distributed to other entities select "No" and indicate below which entities further consume that service.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Additional Wise entities that will be using the service
Question Description: Select "Global / Servicing all Wise entities" if the service is not limited to specific entities.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Ownership type of the banking service provider
Question Description: Please indicate the ownership type of the banking service provider

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Contact for Banking Team
Question Description: Please provide the contact details of the person from Wise's banking team.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Nature of the engagement
Question Description: Please select the type of engagement into which we will enter with the provider.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: What is the length of this third party engagement?
Question Description: Please indicate the length of the engagement. If a definitive duration is not specified please provide your preferred ideal length for this engagement.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Renewal clause
Question Description: Does this engagement include an automatic renewal clause? Kindly specify if this engagement contains a clause for automatic renewal in the contract.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Total Contract Value
Question Description: If you currently possess the order form/contract kindly specify the total cost as detailed in the document. If you have only received a quote or an initial indicative cost please provide that information. State the cost excluding any applicable taxes and VAT. If you're opting for a monthly subscription please indicate the estimated cost per annum.Example 1: You are signing a contract with a cost of $10000 per annum for three years with an implementation fee of $5000. The total contract value is therefore $35000.Example 2: You're buying a monthly subscription for $100 per month. Please enter the annual value as the total value; in this case would be $1200.For FREE Trials & POCs please enter "0" as the amount.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please choose the payment method for this arrangement.
Question Description: Wise's standard payment method is via invoice. Please refer to our [Corporate Card Policy](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/FIN/pages/2976858643/Corporate+credit+card+policy) for more information. Direct debits are only to be used with appropriate approval from Accounts Payable.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please select the cost centre that will be incurring this cost.
Question Description: The appropriate Finance business partner managing the cost centre will be notified of the vendor request.If unsure of which cost centre to select please consult with your manager or a member of the Finance team. If the cost is split between multiple cost centres please choose the main one.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Start Date
Question Description: Please indicate the planned or proposed start date for this engagement.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Contract: End date
Question Description: Please enter the contract end date if known. In case of a POC please indicate the tentative end date for the trial and in case of a recurring agreement the next known renewal date.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Commercials
Question Description: Please upload any commercial/pricing documents relating to this engagement such as quotes proposals and draft commercial documents.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please provide the registered address of the third party.
Question Description: If you have this information now please populate - otherwise the supplier will need to populate this.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Do you require login information such as username and password or API keys and tokens to use this service or solution?
Question Description: Any services requiring login information will have to be registered in UT.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Acknowledgement of Contracting Process
Question Description: Per Wise's Third Party Management and Outsourcing Policy we are required to perform Due Diligence and obtain approval before finalizing a contract with a third party. Kindly refrain from executing the contract until the onboarding process for the third party has been satisfactorily completed.PS! If you're sharing Wise data with your counterparty during onboarding you should sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA). Learn more about [NDAs here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TPM/pages/3747986721/Third+Party+Contract+Management+Hub+-+DRAFT+not+final#1%EF%B8%8F%E2%83%A3--Non-Disclose-Agreement-(NDA))

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Request for proposal
Question Description: We strongly recommend going through the Request for Proposal (RFP) process to help us choose the best vendor ensuring we find the right fit for our needs and get the best value! [Check out RFP guide here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/TPM/pages/3622411165/RFP+Process+A+Step-by-Step+Guide) and feel free to reach out on #thirdpartymanagement for assistance!

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Conflict of Interest
Question Description: Please confirm that you (Relationship Owner) the Cost Centre owner or the signatory of the contract are not aware of and do not have any actual potential or perceived conflicts of interest in relation to the onboarding of this Service Provider. This means that you or to the best of your knowledge any other involved party have no personal interests such as family friendships financial or social factors that could compromise your judgment decisions or actions in relation to this Service Provider.Please ensure to consult our [Global Conflict of Interest Policy](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/CC/pages/2765980971/Global+Conflicts+of+Interest+Policy) for further guidance. In case of a conflict a ticket must be raised through the [Conflicts of Interest Tool](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/servicedesk/customer/portal/1117).

Question Title: If we decide to move away from the current service provider which substitution method would you find most viable?

Replacing the service might require re-engineering business processes or redeveloping applications.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: How difficult is it to substitute the third party or its service?
Question Description: Timelines must cover necessary planning governance funding approval contract negotiation and migration work.Instant - will be transferred within 24 hours to already contracted backup third party or moved in-house without changes to the business model or operational setup with no need for additional resource allocation without any impact on our business continuity or risk profile.Easy - will be completed within six months. The service can either be replaced or moved in-house allowing for the transfer without changes to the business model or operational setup. It will rely solely on internal resources without substantial need for additional resource allocation and won’t highly impact our business continuity or risk profile.Difficult - will take longer than six months to complete. It requires significant changes to our business model including business process re-engineering redevelopment or changes to our operational setup. For example it may require the creation of new functions or squads to bring the service in-house or manage the transition to another provider. This will require substantial additional resources including costs recruitment of new skills and is likely highly impact our business continuity risk profile or ability to grow.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will the potential disruption failure or inadequate performance of the third party have a significant (material) impact on Wise?
Question Description: When evaluating consider if the service is easily transferable which would reduce the impact.Potential Material Impacts:1. Breach of Confidentiality or Data Availability: Could it lead to a breach of confidentiality or failure to ensure data availability and integrity for Wise customers or counterparties?2. Reputation & Financial Resilience: Could it cause significant loss of customer trust negative media decreased customer acquisition/retention or unexpected financial losses (£250k+)?3. Legal & Regulatory Compliance: Could it result in critical legal/regulatory issues breaches of obligations/licenses or direct regulatory fines?4. Operational Resilience & Business Continuity: Could it materially impair Wise’s operational resilience business continuity or expose Wise to operational risks (conduct legal ICT) such as prolonged system outages or severe incidents (Sev 1/Sev 2) inline with the Incident Severity Matrix?5. Risk Management & Audits: Could it lead to an inability to identify monitor and manage all risks or conduct appropriate third-party audits?

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will potential failures from third party have a significant (material) impact on Wise’s counterparties or customers potentially causing losses to them?
Question Description: Consider the reduced impact if the service is easily/instantly transferrable and select the impact areas:Please select the choices that are only significantly and directly impacted.The selected answers will require a comment to explain the rationale for the most direct impact and why it is considered material.Examples:Customers:For example if a third party's failure impairs the ability to protect its customers' data and maintain data confidentiality availability and integrity which could lead to significant issues such as the exposure of PII sufficient to facilitate identity theft of 5 k and more Wise customers or a breach privacy regulations affecting 500 k and more customers which may ultimately cause financial losses for the customers.Counterparties: For example due to third party failures the SLA or contract with Wise’s counterparties can be breached or severely impaired for a long time causing losses; Wise's partners would incur losses as customers who use Wise through integration may be unable to complete transactions due to the impact of a third party failure.Additionally material impacts can be analysed through the components of potential SEV 1 or SEV 2 level incidents in the [the severity matrix here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IM/pages/2729517311?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiYjhkNmU3ODEwMjJjNDlhZTgxZmYxYjIyNjA5YzczNjciLCJwIjoiY29uZmx1ZW5jZS1jaGF0cy1pbnQifQ)

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will the third party process or perform transactions on Personal Data or other types of non-public Wise data?
Question Description: Processing is a broad term that encompasses various activities whether done manually or through automation highlighting the need for careful data management at every step.Please see a full explanation of Processing [here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PKS/pages/3674715436/What+is+processing).Personal data is any information relating to an identified or identifiable person.Please see a full explanation of Personal Data [here](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/PKS/pages/3495500098/What+is+Personal+Data). Includes explanation of Special Category Data (also known as sensitive data) (SCD).

Question Title: Please select the volume of Wiser Personal Data shared annually.
Question Description: Please provide an estimate of the total volume of Personal Data that will be shared annually.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will the third party process any Wiser Personal Data other than business contact details such as name business email physical address and IP (contact details)?
Question Description: A third party Processing contact details to deliver office equipment or to give Wisers access to ICT services is an administrative function. If third party has to Process additional Personal Data and SCD to deliver Services then this may be high risk Processing.

Question Description: Please provide an estimate of the total volume of non-public data that will be shared annually.For example Wise documents contacts or source code would be considered as non-public Wise data.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will the service or product connect to our PCI cardholder data environment (CDE) or affect the way we store process and/or transmit PCI cardholder data?
Question Description: PCI cardholder data refers to the specific pieces of information associated with credit and debit card transactions. CDE refers to the area of an organization's network and systems where cardholder data is stored processed or transmitted.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: If we decide to move away from the current service provider which substitution method would you find most viable?
Question Description: Consider if alternative banking services can meet your requirements or if in-house solutions are viable. Please select the hybrid substitutability option if the services can be partially brought back in-house and partially outsourced to another banking service provider."Impossible" indicates significant uncertainties such as those caused by being locked into the unique architecture of the service provider. Replacing the service might require re-engineering business processes or redeveloping applications.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: How difficult is it to substitute the banking service?
Question Description: Timelines must cover necessary planning governance funding approval contract negotiation and migration work.Instant - will be transferred within 24 hours to already contracted backup third party or moved in-house without changes to the business model or operational setup with no need for additional resource allocation without any impact on our business continuity or risk profile.Easy - will be completed within six months. The service can either be replaced or moved in-house allowing for the transfer without changes to the business model or operational setup. It will rely solely on internal resources without substantial need for additional resource allocation and won’t highly impact our business continuity or risk profile.Difficult - will take longer than six months to complete. It requires significant changes to our business model including business process re-engineering redevelopment or changes to our operational setup. For example it may require the creation of new functions or squads to bring the service in-house or manage the transition to another provider. This will require substantial additional resources including costs recruitment of new skills and is likely highly impact our business continuity risk profile or ability to grow.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Can additional services/volume be added without making changes to the main agreement?
Question Description: Can we add services without changing the MSA? E.g signing additional order form.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will the potential disruption failure or inadequate performance of the banking service provider have a significant (material) impact on Wise?
Question Description: When evaluating consider if the service is easily transferable which would reduce the impact.Potential Material Impacts:1. Breach of Confidentiality or Data Availability: Could it lead to a breach of confidentiality or failure to ensure data availability and integrity for Wise customers or counterparties?2. Reputation & Financial Resilience: Could it cause significant loss of customer trust negative media decreased customer acquisition/retention or unexpected financial losses (£250k+)?3. Legal & Regulatory Compliance: Could it result in critical legal/regulatory issues breaches of obligations/licenses or direct regulatory fines?4. Operational Resilience & Business Continuity: Could it materially impair Wise’s operational resilience business continuity or expose Wise to operational risks (conduct legal ICT) such as prolonged system outages or severe incidents (Sev 1/Sev 2) inline with the Incident Severity Matrix?5. Risk Management & Audits: Could it lead to an inability to identify monitor and manage all risks or conduct appropriate third-party audits?

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Will potential failures from banking service provider have a significant (material) impact on Wise’s counterparties or customers potentially causing losses to them?
Question Description: Consider the reduced impact if the service is easily/instantly transferrable and select the impact areas:Please select the choices that are only significantly and directly impacted.The selected answers will require a comment to explain the rationale for the most direct impact and why it is considered material.Examples:Customers:For example if a third party's failure impairs the ability to protect its customers' data and maintain data confidentiality availability and integrity which could lead to significant issues such as the exposure of PII sufficient to facilitate identity theft of 5 k and more Wise customers or a breach privacy regulations affecting 500 k and more customers which may ultimately cause financial losses for the customers.Counterparties: For example due to third party failures the SLA or contract with Wise’s counterparties can be breached or severely impaired for a long time causing losses; Wise's partners would incur losses as customers who use Wise through integration may be unable to complete transactions due to the impact of a third party failure.Additionally material impacts can be analysed through the components of potential SEV 1 or SEV 2 level [Incident Severity Matrix](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IM/pages/2729517311?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiYjhkNmU3ODEwMjJjNDlhZTgxZmYxYjIyNjA5YzczNjciLCJwIjoiY29uZmx1ZW5jZS1jaGF0cy1pbnQifQ)

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: In the event of a service outage or disruption to the procured services for 1 hour what is the expected impact on the services we provide or systems we use?
Question Description: Assess the expected impact on Wise's corporate activities and services in the event of a short-term disruption in the continuity of third party activities.Consider the reduced impact if the service is easily/instantly transferrable.Please go through the [Incident Severity Matrix](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IM/pages/2729517311?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiYjhkNmU3ODEwMjJjNDlhZTgxZmYxYjIyNjA5YzczNjciLCJwIjoiY29uZmx1ZW5jZS1jaGF0cy1pbnQifQ) and identify impacted areas for selected incident level in the next question.

Workflow Name: New Service or Third Party Onboarding
Question Title: Please identify all impacted areas for the severity tier selected.
Question Description: Based on the incident level selected in the previous question identify all impacted areas according to the [Incident Severity Matrix](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/IM/pages/2729517311?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiYjhkNmU3ODEwMjJjNDlhZTgxZmYxYjIyNjA5YzczNjciLCJwIjoiY29uZmx1ZW5jZS1jaGF0cy1pbnQifQ).

Question Description: Assess the expected impact on Wise's corporate activities and services in the event of a long-term disruption in the continuity of third party activities.Consider the reduced impact if the service is easily/instantly transferrable and select the estimated impact on business operations in the event of an extended service outage or service discontinuation.Please go through the [Risk Impact Matrix](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/GRM/pages/1322275894/Risk+Impact+Likelihood+Matrix+Heatmap) and identify impacted areas in the next question.Please go through the [Risk Impact Matrix](https://transferwise.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/GRM/pages/1322275894/Risk+Impact+Likelihood+Matrix+Heatmap) and refer to the thresholds listed for Wise Global when selecting the impact level.
